# Dialect stub — Khaleeji (GCC)

**Scope:** Informal routing cues only — not a full copy deck.

## When to use

- Audience in UAE, Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, Bahrain, Qatar, Oman.
- Brand voice explicitly Gulf-facing while staying understandable across GCC.

## Contrast with Masri (avoid leakage)

- Reduce Egyptian fillers (`يعني`, `أصلاً`, `برضه`) unless brand is deliberately Egyptian-in-Gulf storytelling.
- Common Gulf markers include `وايد`, `زين`, `شلون`, `الحين` (usage varies by country — confirm with brief).

## Escalation

Long-form TV/radio, regulated finance/health, or dialect purity disputes → **native GCC reviewer or LSP**.
